zh.Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Savage於大約1335年出生在英國越可爾斯泰斯比時，他的父親Robert Savage32歲，母親Amicia de Walkington31歲。他於1365年與Margaret d'Anyers在英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年在英國爾克里夫頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

zh-hans.Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Savage于大约1335年出生在英国越可爾斯泰斯比时，他的父亲Robert Savage32岁，母亲Amicia de Walkington31岁。他于1365年与Margaret d'Anyers在英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年在英国爾克里夫頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Savage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for a wild or uncouth person, from Middle English and Old French salvage, sauvage ‘wild, untamed’ (from Late Latin salvaticus, literally ‘man of the woods’, a derivative of Latin silva ‘wood’ influenced by Latin salvus ‘whole’, i.e. natural). Compare French Sauvage .

Irish (Down): generally of English origin (it was taken to County Down in the 12th century), this name has also sometimes been adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Sabháin, the name of a small south Munster sept, which was earlier Anglicized as O'Savin (see Savin ).
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic) Savich and of Serbian Savić (see Savic ).

variants.name: Savitt
meanings: Possibly English or Irish: variant of   Savage  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
Alternatively, perhaps an Americanized form of Jewish   Savich   or an American shortened and altered form of Jewish   Savitski  .

variants.name: Sauvage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Armand, Jean-Jacques.

French and Channel Islands: nickname for a wild or uncouth person, from Old French salvage, sauvage ‘untamed’ (from Late Latin salvaticus, a derivative of Latin silva ‘wood’, influenced by Latin salvus ‘whole’, i.e. natural). This surname is also found in England.
History: Jean Sauvage from Plouëc-du-Trieux in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany (France), married Marguerite Martin in Les Cèdres, QC, in 1782.

variants.name: Salvage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique.
English (Sussex): variant of   Savage  .
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Ramage
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin); French: nickname for a savage or unpredictable individual, from Old French ramage ‘wild, untamed’. The word is recorded once in Middle English with the sense ‘courageous’ and in Scots (spelled rammage) as ‘rash, furious’. Compare Savage .

variants.name: Sabin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Northamptonshire): from the Middle English personal name Sabin (from Latin Sabinus; see 2 below) or its female equivalent Sabine (from Latin Sabina). In medieval England the feminine form was always more popular as a personal name.

French: from the Old French personal name Sabin, from Latin Sabinus. The name was originally referred to the Sabines, an ancient Italic people of central Italy whose name is of uncertain origin. In the 8th century BC the Romans slaughtered the Sabine menfolk and carried off the women. More influential as far as name-giving is concerned was the existence of several early Christian saints named Sabinus.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sabháin ‘descendant of Sabhán’, a personal name based on sabh ‘cub’. As an Irish surname, this has mostly been absorbed into Savage .

variants.name: Selvidge
meanings: English (Leicestershire):
from Middle English selvage, silvadge ‘edge of a cloth, bandage, ornamental edging (to a cloth or garment)’, hence a nickname for someone who made or sold such items.
variant of   Savage  .

variants.name: Savidge
meanings: English: variant of   Savage  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Savage was born about 1335, in Stainsby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Savage, was 32 and his mother, Amicia de Walkington, was 31. He married Margaret d'Anyers in 1365, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 10 daughters. He died in 1386, in Clifton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, England.

fr.St. Michael and All Angels Church, Maccl: St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Savage est né environ 1335, à Stainsby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Savage, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Amicia de Walkington, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret d'Anyers en 1365, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé en 1386, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Savage um 1335 in Stainsby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Savage 32 und seine Mutter Amicia de Walkington 31. Er hat 1365 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret d'Anyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Clifton, Cheshire, England und wurde in St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Savage è nato il circa 1335 nel Stainsby, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Savage, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Amicia de Walkington, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret d'Anyers nel 1365, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 10 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel Clifton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Savageが約1335年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスティインスビーで生まれた時，父Robert Savageは32歳，母Amicia de Walkingtonは31歳であった。1365年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルでMargaret d'Anyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年にイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンで52歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドスト ミチャエル アンド アル アンジェルス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Michael and All Angels Church, Maccl: 영국 체실르 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Savage(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 요르크실르 스테인스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Savage(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia de Walkington(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체아들일에서 Margaret d'Anyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 영국 체실르 클리프턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Savage nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Stainsby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Savage, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Amicia de Walkington, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret d'Anyers em 1365, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1386, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Michael and All Angels Church, Maccl: ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Savage родился около 1335 г. в местности стеинсби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Savage было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Amicia de Walkington, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret d'Anyers в 1365 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 10 дочерей. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret d'Anyers en 1365, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en 1386, en Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en St Michael And All Angels' Church, Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
